title: [VMIC-A1] Virtual audio device enumeration and probe
scope: Detect VB-CABLE/VAC/Voicemeeter render endpoints; classify by name; mark [VIRTUAL] in CLI output

commands.name: acceptance-test-cases
commands.command: cargo +stable-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu test --bin tui-translator -- detects_vbcable_by_name detects_vac_by_name regular_device_is_not_virtual

notes: classify_virtual_device() is pure (no I/O), cross-platform, case-insensitive substring matching.
VB-CABLE checked before VAC to avoid any false-positive from the shared 'cable' substring.
probe_virtual_audio_devices() delegates to list_capture_devices() on Windows; returns Ok(vec![]) on non-Windows.
No new crate dependencies added; uses existing wasapi crate via the existing list_capture_devices path.
CLI write_audio_devices() annotates matching devices with ' [VIRTUAL]' before the default marker.
test probe_is_idempotent verifies repeated calls return same length and same name/id/kind values.
